{{ isEditMode ? 'Edit City' : 'Add City' }}
Auth Active Discard
City Name City Name is required Only letters and single spaces allowed (minimum 2 characters) City Name cannot exceed 50 characters City Short Name CityShortName is required Latitude Longitude City Remark @if (cityForm.get('CityRemark')?.invalid && cityForm.get('CityRemark')?.touched) { City Remark is required }
City Code @if (cityForm.get('CityCode')?.invalid && cityForm.get('CityCode')?.touched) { City Code is required }
Country {{ country.CountryName }} @if (cityForm.get('CityCountryID')?.invalid && cityForm.get('CityCountryID')?.touched) { Country name is required } State {{ state.StateName }} District {{ district.DistrictName }} City Tier Type {{ tier.TierTypeName }}
